caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses stands against a plain, dark gray background. She wears a light green, short-sleeved top decorated with small red floral embroidery around the neckline and a dark necklace. In the bottom left and right corners of the frames, there is a circular logo featuring a stylized sun and the text "NPTEL". Throughout the sequence, the woman is speaking and gesturing with her hands. Initially, she holds her right hand over her chest, then gradually moves both hands outward and downward in a fluid motion to emphasize her points. Her facial expressions shift from a neutral, attentive look to a more active speaking posture with an open mouth. The setting and her clothing remain constant across the sequence as the focus remains on her delivery and hand movements.
